terms.definition: Anthropic's method training models to critique and revise outputs against explicit principles, using AI feedback to scale harmlessness alignment.
A set of natural-language rules and values the model uses during critique and revision—not a legal document, but training guidance.
A training pattern where the model drafts an answer, evaluates it against principles, and produces an improved version.
An alignment objective reducing toxic, illegal, or dangerously enabling outputs—one pillar alongside helpfulness and honesty.
